headline: MyDigital ID Reaches 18 Million Users With Security Concerns
context: MyDigital ID programme reached 18 million registered users by February 2026 covering 72% of Malaysian adults.

cards.big: MyDigital ID reaches 18 million users but audit finds 8 vulnerabilities
cards.sub: Government digital identity covers 72% of adults after 2 years rollout

cards.big: System processes 2.8 million government transactions monthly
cards.sub: Average service completion dropped from 45 minutes to 8 minutes

cards.big: Independent security audit identified 8 critical vulnerabilities in platform
cards.sub: 3 vulnerabilities could theoretically allow identity spoofing if exploited

cards.big: 12 million Malaysians including most over-60s have not registered
cards.sub: Digital divide means government must maintain parallel physical services

cards.big: Digital ID tests whether convenience and security can coexist in government systems
18 million MyDigital ID users with security concerns. Digital identity must be built on trust, not mandates.
